sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a history of anaphylaxis and current use of an epinephrine auto-injector. He also reports pain and tenderness in his elbow and forearm, with swelling and redness present. He experiences pain with elbow flexion and extension.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The x-ray of the elbow demonstrates mild lateral elbow swelling but no fracture.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and exam findings are consistent with lateral epicondylitis.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I am prescribing ibuprofen 800 mg every six hours and recommending a sling for comfort. I am also providing a prescription for 30 doses of ibuprofen. Follow up as needed.
